name: De-Tan Radiance Cleanse Face Wash
short: A de-tan face wash with saffron, aloe, and an AHA+BHA blend to remove sun-induced dullness and brighten skin.
description: De-Tan Radiance Cleanse is a daily brightening face wash designed to lift sun-induced tan, pollution, and dullness. A blend of glycolic and salicylic acids gently exfoliates, while Kashmiri saffron — prized for centuries in Ayurveda for its complexion-evening properties — helps revive radiance. Aloe vera soothes and hydrates so skin feels clean and comfortable, never tight. Free from silicone, phosphate, GMO, and artificial colour. Use daily for visibly brighter, more even-toned skin.
benefits: Removes sun-induced tan and dullness with AHA+BHA blend
Free from silicone, phosphate, GMO, and artificial colour
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Best suited for dull, tanned, or uneven skin.

customerReviews.title: Refreshing and Effective Face Wash
customerReviews.body: It’s been a week since I started using this face wash and I’m really impressed. It removes dirt and excess oil very effectively and gives an instant fresh feeling after every wash. My skin feels clean, bright, smooth, and refreshed without becoming dry.

customerReviews.title: Good
customerReviews.body: I’m really impressed with the APS Majeste D-Tan Face Wash! It gives excellent de-tan results and makes my skin look noticeably cleaner, brighter, and refreshed after every use. With regular use, my skin feels smooth, fresh, and visibly more even-toned — definitely a great face wash for daily tan removal and glowing skin.

customerReviews.title: Gentle to your skin
customerReviews.body: Amazing facewash with good smell, gentle to your skin and keep your skin moisturize. Best you after after coming from sunny day. Must try ....

customerReviews.title: Gentle everyday facewash
customerReviews.body: It is a really good everyday cleanser. It removes oil and dirt well without drying the skin. My face feels fresh, soft, and looks brighter after each wash. Gentle on skin and worth trying.

customerReviews.title: Great for Tan Removal
customerReviews.body: Really liked this detan face wash. It leaves my skin feeling fresh, clean, and visibly brighter after a few uses. Great for daily use and definitely worth trying 👍

customerReviews.title: Best De-Tan Face Wash
customerReviews.body: Very effective face wash - Must Try.
